zh.lifeSummary: 當William John Diffee於1710年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親William John Diffee25歲，母親Mary Bigelow15歲。他於1727年與Mary Elizabeth York結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1783年5月17日在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫享年73歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫格雷斯 查阿培爾奧德爾 特洛格頓 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William John Diffee于1710年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲William John Diffee25岁，母亲Mary Bigelow15岁。他于1727年与Mary Elizabeth York结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1783年5月17日在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫享年73岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫格雷斯 查阿培爾奧德爾 特洛格頓 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Diffee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Diffey  . Compare   Defee  .

History: William Diffee, from whom present-day American bearers of this name are descended, was born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, and died in 1790 in Randolph County, NC. His surname was also spelled Diffey, while his descendants also bear the surname Defee .

variants.name: Diffey
meanings: English (Dorset): perhaps a nickname from Anglo-Norman French defaé, defieu ‘faithless, disloyal’. Compare Diffee .

variants.name: Defee
meanings: History: This surname is borne by the descendants of William Diffee, born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, died 1790 in Randolph County, NC. The same spelling is recorded in London, England, in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

historicEvents.title: Boston Tea Party
historicEvents.description: Thousands of British troops were sent to Boston to enforce Britain's tax laws. Taxes were repealed on all imports to the American Colonies except tea. Americans, disguised as Native Americans, dumped chests of tea imported by the East India Company into the Boston Harbor in protest. This escalated tensions between the American Colonies and the British government.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When William John Diffee was born in 1710, in Dorset, England, his father, William John Diffee, was 25 and his mother, Mary Bigelow, was 15. He married Mary Elizabeth York in 1727. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 17 May 1783, in Randolph, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William John Diffee est né en 1710, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, William John Diffee, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Bigelow, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth York en 1727. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1783, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William John Diffee 1710 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William John Diffee 25 und seine Mutter Mary Bigelow 15. Er hat 1727 Mary Elizabeth York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. it.lifeSummary: Quando William John Diffee è nato il nel 1710 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, William John Diffee, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Bigelow, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth York nel 1727. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 maggio 1783, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William John Diffeeが1710年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父William John Diffeeは25歳，母Mary Bigelowは15歳であった。1727年にMary Elizabeth Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1783年5月17日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフグレイズ チャペルオデル トログドン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William John Diffee(이)가 1710년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Diffee(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Bigelow(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1727년 Mary Elizabeth York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1783년 5월 17일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프 그라이스 차플 오데 트로그던 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William John Diffee nasceu em 1710, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William John Diffee, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bigelow, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth York em 1727. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1783, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William John Diffee родился в 1710 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William John Diffee было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bigelow, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth York в 1727 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 мая 1783 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности оделл трогдон кеметири, греис чапел, рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William John Diffee nació en 1710, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, William John Diffee, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Bigelow, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Mary Elizabeth York en 1727. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1783, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
